def positive_asyncio_sleep_zero_busy_wait_pattern():
    rule_id = "asyncio_sleep_zero_busy_wait_pattern"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "asyncio.sleep(0) used in a tight loop as a busy-wait yield pattern instead of a proper event-driven wait."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
